name: Keurig Dr Pepper
analysis: KDP's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 7% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at $32.3100. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $32.5200, stop $29.5317, target $41.4849 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
